title: Deep Learning Identification of Distinct EEG Signatures in Fibromyalgia
author: Dr. Jean-Marie Amodeo

steps.title: Chronic pain affects approximately 25% of...
steps.instruction: Chronic pain affects approximately 25% of adults in developed countries and is one of the leading causes of disability and reduced quality of life. Fibromyalgia affects 2–4% of the population and remains difficult to diagnose and treat due to lack of objective biomarkers.

steps.title: Fibromyalgia is associated with increased theta...
steps.instruction: Fibromyalgia is associated with increased theta power, decreased alpha–beta power, and hyperconnectivity in salience and Default Mode Networks.

steps.title: Current studies ignore the temporal dimension...
steps.instruction: Current studies ignore the temporal dimension of chronicity and rely on resting-state EEG only.

steps.title: VR enables controlled sensory stimulation to...
steps.instruction: VR enables controlled sensory stimulation to measure dynamic brain responses and plasticity.

steps.title: Established chronicity is identifiable via static...
steps.instruction: Established chronicity is identifiable via static EEG and dynamic VR EEG signatures.
